plan.objective: DECOMPOSE (not discharge) kotecky_preiss_criterion_Surface for the real integral operator T_L

honesty_locks.hw1_constraint_source: CERT_Arb_beta0 (VERIFIED_OUT_OF_TOWER); beta0 certified in [2.079416880123, 2.079416880124] under repo action S=(3-Re tr U)/3

target_surface.name: kotecky_preiss_criterion_Surface
target_surface.statement: exists beta0>0, forall beta>beta0, exists gap>0, forall L f, (integral f=0) -> ||T_L L beta f|| <= exp(-(beta*gap)) * ||f||
target_surface.non_vacuous_reason: exp(-(beta*gap))<1 for gap>0,beta>0 => STRICTLY stronger than proven ||T_L||<=1
target_surface.scope: uniform-in-L, FIXED-beta LATTICE spectral gap on vacuum-orthogonal sector
target_surface.NOT_in_scope: continuum limit, lattice-spacing->0, OS reconstruction, Clay continuum mass gap

D3.statement: sum_{gamma in 0} |z(gamma)| e^{|gamma|} < inf at FINITE beta0

reduction_chain: D4 => D5 => (D1+D2 => D3 KP-summable) => D6 => target. Valid ONLY if all D1..D6 hold; NONE discharged.

branch_warning.note: single polymer beta->inf limit does NOT close KP (KP needs uniform SUM at finite beta0)

termination.conclusion: EVERY leaf is open research or OUT-OF-TOWER. Surface #1 and YM tower stay OPEN. No mass-gap claim.
